title: Invalid Webhook URL for JIRA Trigger
symptom: When attempting to use JIRA as a trigger, an error indicates that the webhook URL is invalid. The error specifies that only HTTPS protocol is allowed.
not_this_if: Webhook URL is correctly configured with HTTPS
root_cause: JIRA requires that all webhook URLs use the HTTPS protocol for security reasons. If the webhook URL is configured with HTTP or is missing the protocol, JIRA will reject the request, resulting in an error.
fix_steps: Verify the value of the WEBHOOK_URL environment variable
agent_instruction: Check and update the WEBHOOK_URL environment variable to use HTTPS, then restart n8n.
